notes: MIL-DTL-46100 Class 4 extra-high-hardness armor steel. 578-640 BHN. RHAe ~1.45-1.55 per mm vs AP per ARL-TR-4632. Approaching UHH (ultra-high-hardness) class. Requires specialized welding procedures. Used in premium applique armor packages.

source.methodology: RHAe extrapolated from ARL-TR-4632 hardness-to-RHAe curve for highest hardness class. Hardness range per MIL-DTL-46100 Class 4 specification.
